---
title: "ReDiLEEP Doctoral Network Funded"
description: "ReDiLEEP has been selected for funding as a Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions Doctoral Network."
date: 2026-05-20
categories: [funding, network]
image: ../assets/hero-network.png
---

ReDiLEEP has been selected for funding as a Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions Doctoral Network.

The network will train doctoral candidates to advance response diversity science and apply it to ecosystem preservation, restoration, biodiversity monitoring, and policy.
